title: Checking or changing the conditions of your visitor visa or NZeTA :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Checking or changing the conditions of your visitor visa or NZeTA
Find out how to check the conditions of your visitor visa and if you can work remotely on a visitor visa. Learn how to apply to change the conditions of your visa, or make a change to your New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA).
- Request a change to your NZeTA Use this form to update passport details, name changes, email addresses, and correct small errors on an NZeTA.

## Request a change to your NZeTA
Use this form to update passport details, name changes, email addresses, and correct small errors on an NZeTA.
- Check or change your visitor visa conditions Visitor visas come with conditions or rules about studying, working, and travelling. Find out how to check your conditions and apply to change them.

## Check or change your visitor visa conditions
Visitor visas come with conditions or rules about studying, working, and travelling. Find out how to check your conditions and apply to change them.
- Working remotely in New Zealand on a visitor visa You may be able to work remotely for an overseas business or client while you are visiting New Zealand.

## Working remotely in New Zealand on a visitor visa
You may be able to work remotely for an overseas business or client while you are visiting New Zealand.
